title: Codex Remote GA and mobile remote work
author: OpenAI
why_it_matters: Codex mobile/remote is the strongest match for the user's iPhone + Mac collaboration goal.
actionable_takeaway: Use iPhone for task start, follow-up, and approval; keep final review on Mac.

title: Run Codex in the cloud with DigitalOcean
author: DigitalOcean
why_it_matters: Codex can provision a remote development environment instead of relying only on the local Mac.
actionable_takeaway: Evaluate long builds, large repo exploration, and demo verification as cloud candidates.

title: Subagents in Codex
author: OpenAI Developers
why_it_matters: Complex research and publishing flows can be split across specialized agents.
actionable_takeaway: Split AI Radar into collection, fact-checking, workflow translation, and publishing roles.

title: Codex Automations
author: OpenAI Developers
why_it_matters: Explains why a static site will not update unless a scheduled task updates and deploys it.
actionable_takeaway: Automation must write data, commit, push, deploy, and verify Ready.

title: Codex changelog
author: OpenAI Developers
why_it_matters: Official changelog is the baseline for verifying X and media interpretation.
actionable_takeaway: Check changelog before accepting any second-hand claim about Codex features.

title: Codex Micro hardware teaser
author: OpenAI Developers / Work Louder
why_it_matters: A hardware shortcut surface suggests Codex workflows are becoming frequent enough to deserve physical controls.
actionable_takeaway: List repeatable Codex actions before deciding whether hardware shortcuts matter.

title: OpenAI teases Codex Micro mini keyboard controller
author: Business Insider
why_it_matters: Cross-checks the Codex Micro teaser and launch timing around 2026-07-15.
actionable_takeaway: Mark 2026-07-15 as a watch date, not a purchase decision date.

title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
author: OpenAI
why_it_matters: Codex is framed beyond coding, which supports collecting design, research, and operations workflows.
actionable_takeaway: Do not filter AI Radar down to developer-only coding tips.

title: June for OpenAI Developers
author: OpenAI Developers
why_it_matters: Monthly developer summaries are a high-signal source for Codex and platform changes.
actionable_takeaway: Put OpenAI Developers into the observation pool.

title: digitalocean/CodexPlugin
author: DigitalOcean
why_it_matters: The plugin repo shows the operational path behind DigitalOcean for Codex.
actionable_takeaway: Evaluate cost, deletion, SSH safety, and whether data is safe for cloud execution.

title: Use subagents and custom agents in Codex
author: Simon Willison
why_it_matters: Shows concrete subagent task phrasing and cross-agent comparisons.
actionable_takeaway: Create subagent-style prompts for high-value AI Radar cards.

title: AI agents are here for real this time
author: Axios
why_it_matters: Supports the larger trend that Codex-like agents are shifting work from chat to delegated tasks.
actionable_takeaway: Keep AI Radar as an action launcher, not only a reading dashboard.
